company_context: Social Media Management, Paid & Organic Social - Naytev Naytev Close menu Product 📱 Organic Social Publishing ⚡ Paid Social 🧪 Creative Testing 📊 Free Social Analytics ✍️ Branded Content ⚖️ How We Compare CASE STUDIES Learn 💡 Insights 🎙️ Future of Media Podcast Social media super powers for content teams Automate & optimize paid and organic social across every network. The social media management and automation platform loved by content teams worldwide. Learn more → The social media management and automation platform loved by: Automate & optimize paid and organic social across every network 📊 Social Analytics Our Free Social Analytics provide a unified, cross-network perspective. Create unlimited dashboards from hundreds of paid and organic metrics. 📅 Organic Social The most powerful and intuitive social media scheduling you've ever used. Complete with live post previews and recirculation. 💰 Paid Social Run advanced campaigns, boost posts manually or automatically, A/B test, and optimize for the conversions you care about. The Core Platform: Unified Social Analytics and Automation Naytev is built on top of a solid base of social analytics and automation. Unlike legacy platforms, our unified social analytics make it possible to understand the actual ROI of your content. 📈 Unified Data Ditch your spreadsheets and automatically track content performance in a single place. ⚙️ Workflow Automation Quickly define complex workflows and notifications across your entire content portfolio. 💡 Insights Combining paid and organic under one roof provides a clear view of your content ROI. How We're Different Content First: Our Unique Approach to Social Legacy social media management tools treat paid and organic social as independent silos, with every post and paid campaign happening in a vacuum. It's not a winning strategy. Naytev consolidates your entire social media workflow under one roof. Putting individual pieces of content at the center of the platform puts you in control. Proven Results Naytev helps content teams achieve significant improvements in social media performance through our proven A/B testing and automation platform. What Our Clients Say Don't just take our word for it. Here's what leading content teams have to say about Naytev. " By testing all of our content before posting it on Facebook, we're able to identify the messages that most resonate with our readers, which means our content performs well organically when we post it. " Alexis Grant Executive Editor " DramaFever is fundamentally about connecting passionate audiences with content they love. I use Naytev on a daily basis to make sure we are doing our best to engage with people across every demographic and fuel that passion. " Dan Acton Social Media Director " This is awesome! Much more intuitive than Facebook's Power Editor, and really easy for anyone to run great Dark Tests. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm a representative from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours optimize their social media management and automation. I came across Naytev and was impressed with the work you're doing in the space. Can I have a few minutes to discuss how our solution can help you?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (sighs) Okay, I'm listening. But to be honest, we're pretty busy right now, trying to scale our paid and organic social media efforts. What makes you think your solution is relevant to us?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our solution can help you process and analyze large amounts of data from your social media campaigns, providing valuable insights that can inform your content strategy. We've worked with similar companies in the past and seen significant improvements in their social media ROI.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds interesting, but we already have a robust analytics platform in place. How does your solution integrate with our existing tools, and what's the cost? We're on a tight budget and can't afford to take on any unnecessary expenses.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our solution can integrate with most analytics platforms, and we offer a tiered pricing model that can accommodate different budgets. However, I'd need to discuss the specifics with our sales team to provide a more accurate quote. But I can tell you that our solution has helped other companies reduce their data processing costs by up to 30%.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) That sounds too good to be true. How do you handle data security and compliance? We deal with sensitive customer data and can't afford to compromise that. And what about the implementation timeline? We can't afford to take on a long and complicated onboarding process.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns. We take data security and compliance very seriously, and our solution is fully compliant with all major regulations. As for implementation, our onboarding process is designed to be as smooth and efficient as possible, with most companies up and running within a few weeks.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (firmly) I appreciate the pitch, Alex, but to be honest, this isn't a priority for us right now. We're too busy trying to meet our quarterly goals and don't have the bandwidth to take on a new solution. Maybe check in with us in a few months, but for now, we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more effectively addressed the buyer's current priorities and bandwidth constraints to find a potential future opportunity or alternate contact. Sentiment: Neutral
